mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.real_name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher u ON c.teacher_id = u.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, u.real_name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, description, teacher_id, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{teacherId}, #{status})
